maintainer_access: maintainer can administer; required checks still apply to pushes
notes: This file documents the desired branch protection state for the public main branch.
Apply it through GitHub Settings -> Branches -> Add rule, or through a ruleset matching this shape.
Required status checks must use the exact job names emitted by .github/workflows/*.yml.
MCP safe call smoke (ubuntu) runs only on push (not on pull_request) and therefore is not included as a required pull-request status check.
CodeQL Analyze (python) and Analyze (actions) are required because .github/workflows/codeql.yml runs on every push to main and every pull request, in addition to its weekly schedule.

validate.yml exports the 'MCP runtime pin freshness' job (required on PR); dependency-check.yml exports 'MCP runtime pin freshness (scheduled)' which runs on schedule and on push to MCP pin sources and is intentionally not a pull-request required check.
Maintainer keeps administrative access for hotfixes and fullrepo synchronization; admin pushes do not trigger release.yml because that workflow listens on push:tags, not push:branches.
